nodes.label: tactus_power_cradle.scad — Anker 737 / USB hub power cradle
nodes.rationale: Open-faced vented sled, separate from the main box so a 140W Li-ion bank dumping ~33W vents and stays removable, and you can swap Anker 737 (Mode B cordless) <-> 10-port hub (Mode A wall) per demo while seeing the Anker screen + reaching its ports/button. Anker 737 (A1289) measured-spec 155.7 x 54.6 x 49.5 mm. Print one, PETG no supports.

nodes.label: cradle() — vented open-faced power-bank sled
nodes.rationale: Pocket = device + clr(1.5) all-round clearance. Open-top so screen/ports face up; +X end fully open for Anker ports + button. Big floor vents + side-wall vents (heat off the bank). Velcro/strap slots through the floor. Finger scoop on -X end to pop the bank out. Two top retention lips so the device can't slide out.
